Leaderboard › dr_cross_deep_0084

Task dr_cross_deep_0084

tier: deep difficulty: 5/5 shopping + reddit + wikipedia 0 scored
Task prompt
The exact text the agent receives. No hints, no tools beyond the sandbox + LLM.
{'prompt': "Produce an Enumeration / Catalog report cataloguing every household toxin present in shopping keywords, Reddit forums, and Wikipedia articles, including a threat model decision tree for safety. The report is NOT a toxicity level assessment; it is a comprehensive taxonomy of toxins and their safety implications.\n\nGround in >= 120 sandbox URLs (>= 60 cited). (A) `__SHOPPING__` >= 40 pages for products including pesticide spray, household cleaning products, all-purpose cleaner, floor cleaner, dish soap, air freshener, drain cleaner, bug spray, laundry detergent — cite product URL + ingredients + toxicity concerns. (B) `__REDDIT__` >= 30 threads from AskReddit, LifeProTips, HomeImprovement, Parenting, HomeAndGarden, Wellness, HealthyLiving, Toxicology — discussions of safe usage, toxicity, or adverse effects. (C) `__WIKIPEDIA__` >= 25 articles, mandatory: Toxicology, Household chemicals, Pesticides, Poison, Household safety, Child safety, Home cleaning products, Drain cleaner, Insect repellent, Poisonous plants — plus >= 15 more.\n\nOutput a toxins catalog table with columns: Toxin name / Common usage / Toxicity level / Symptoms / Safety recommendations (cited wiki) / Typical product cost (cited shopping) / Community safety sentiment (cited reddit). Add a 'safety decision tree': starting from the user's choice between 'children in home', 'pet ownership', and 'allergies', walk to recommended actions — each node cited. End with '5 toxins/products to AVOID and why' — each w/ shopping URL + reddit URL + wiki URL of the reason.\n\nFormat: markdown links. Begin with the catalog table. No chain-of-thought.", 'sources': {'__SHOPPING__': {'product_pages': 40, 'ingredients': True, 'toxicity_concerns': True}, '__REDDIT__': {'threads': 30, 'discussions': True, 'safety': True, 'adverse_effects': True}, '__WIKIPEDIA__': {'articles': 25, 'mandatory': ['Toxicology', 'Household chemicals', 'Pesticides', 'Poison', 'Household safety', 'Child safety', 'Home cleaning products', 'Drain cleaner', 'Insect repellent', 'Poisonous plants'], 'additional': 15}}, 'format_rules': {'markdown_links': True, 'sandbox_local': True, 'no_fabrication': True}, 'specific_synthesis_requirements': {'task_type': 'enumeration', 'toxins_min': 25, 'catalog_columns': ['Toxin name', 'Common usage', 'Toxicity level', 'Symptoms', 'Safety recommendations', 'Typical product cost', 'Community safety sentiment'], 'min_evidence_per_toxin': {'wikipedia': 1, 'shopping': 1, 'reddit': 1}, 'decision_tree_levels': 3, 'decision_tree_branches': ['children_in_home', 'pet_ownership', 'allergies'], 'avoid_findings_count': 5, 'min_evidence_per_avoid': {'shopping': 1, 'reddit': 1, 'wikipedia': 1}, 'explicitly_forbid_top10': True}}
Hard constraints
Markdown spec
  • ≥ 3500 words
  • ≤ 8000 words
  • ≥ 25 paragraphs
  • ≥ 60 citations
  • ≥ 120 distinct URLs cited
Citation policy
  • ≥ 60 distinct sources
  • ≥ 3 distinct domains
  • __SHOPPING__: ≥ 30
  • __REDDIT__: ≥ 20
  • __WIKIPEDIA__: ≥ 15
Synthesis requirements
  • task_type: enumeration
  • toxins_min: 25
  • catalog_columns: ['Toxin name', 'Common usage', 'Toxicity level', 'Symptoms', 'Safety recommendations', 'Typical product cost', 'Community safety sentiment']
  • min_evidence_per_toxin: {'wikipedia': 1, 'shopping': 1, 'reddit': 1}
  • decision_tree_levels: 3
  • decision_tree_branches: ['children_in_home', 'pet_ownership', 'allergies']
  • avoid_findings_count: 5
  • min_evidence_per_avoid: {'shopping': 1, 'reddit': 1, 'wikipedia': 1}
  • explicitly_forbid_top10: True
Agent ranking on this task
composite_v2 · multiplicative reachability gate
No agents have been scored on this task yet.
